build_title: retatrutide evidence corpus citation graph and scientific review baseline

defects_corrected: Mandatory investigational-status phrase did not exactly match the validator contract.
Registry protocol regression assertion required explicit final-results wording.
PowerShell implementation shortcut was delivered separately from the build package, increasing manual handling and creating avoidable package-selection risk.
The shortcut did not support a one-link implementation bundle with a detached exact SHA-256 input.

The implementation launcher contained a non-ASCII em dash in a UTF-8 file without a byte-order mark, which Windows PowerShell 5.1 decoded as a smart-quote byte and rejected with a missing string terminator parser error.
The release gate validated UTF-8 and line endings but did not enforce Windows PowerShell 5.1 source-decoding compatibility or run a native parser precheck before launcher execution.
The OneDrive restart candidate pipeline returned a scalar string when only one executable path existed, so indexing with [0] supplied only the first character to Start-Process.

The recovery path allowed the complete launcher body to be pasted into an interactive PowerShell prompt, where script-scope param and try/finally constructs were parsed as unrelated commands and mandatory variables were never initialised.
The package import wrapper rediscovered ZIPs across broad download roots instead of receiving the already SHA-verified adjacent inner package path from the implementation launcher.
